agent_trace.summary: [分配中] 正在读取PDF并提取8项答案数据，准备写入answer.txt
agent_trace.raw_tail:
umber
    with pdfplumber.open(pdf_path) as pdf:
        text = ""
        for page in pdf.pages:
            text += page.extract_text() or "" + "\n"
    print("Using pdfplumber")
    print(f"Extracted {len(text)} characters")
    with open(os.path.join(workspace, "pdf_text.txt"), 'w') as f:
        f.write(text)
except Exception as e:
    print(f"pdfplumber failed: {e}")", "cwd": "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/temp", "timeout": 60, "type": "python"}
</tool_code_run>
